title: Grin Coin Counter
short_description: Add up grin coins (ツ) to match the target — a money & decimals game.
description: A coin-counting math game for ~10-year-olds. Pick grin coins (ツ) that add up exactly to the target amount. Eight rounds ramp from whole grin to tenths to hundredths, teaching addition, place value, and decimals (with a nanogrin fun-fact). Fewer coins and first-try answers earn bonus points that feed your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap. Tap coins to add them to your basket, tap a basket chip to remove it, then Check.
